message:
feat(fcp-cli): add posture attestation fields to policy simulation

Update policy simulation input and zone policy objects to support
the new posture verification system:

PolicySimulationInput:
- Add posture_attestation field for attestation validation testing

ZonePolicyObject:
- Add requires_posture field for zone-level posture requirements

These fields enable CLI simulation of posture-gated access control
decisions without requiring a live attestation infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
